doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document misrepresents Illinois landlord-tenant law, incorrectly implies that a 5-day notice terminates a lease without judicial process, and cites a non-existent HUD regulatory standard.
